relationships: ber:Tom seg yiwet n temdint tamecṭuḥt
ber:Tom yettwasseqneɛ dakken yiwet ur tezmir ad teffeɣ yid-s
ber:Samir ur yelli yezmer ad iwali ula d yiwet seg-sent
ber:Sami yetteddu ɣer yiwet n tmesgida tadigant
ber:Yessawal aṭas n tutlayin , tamaziɣt d yiwet deg-sent
ber:Sami yesɛedda yiwet n tallit aydeg ay as-d-yusa yewɛeṛ ad yaɣ tanumi
ber:Sami yella yettmahal deg yiwet n tneččit n wučči arurad
ber:Sami yedder deg yiwet n tmurt ilan idles d anesbaɣur
ber:Ulac ccekk dakken yiwet seg-sent la yeskerkis
ber:Asensu-nni ila yiwet n tegnewt, ad as-tinid aql-ik deg uxxam
ber:Asensu-nni yesɛa yiwet n tegnewt, ad as-tinid aql-ik deg uxxam
ber:Sami yedda ɣer yiwet n tmesgida tadigant
ber:Sami yedder deg yiwet n tmurt yesɛan idles d anesbaɣur
ber:Ziri yella yezdeɣ deg yiwet n taddart d tamecṭuḥt
ber:Ziri atan deg yiwet n temnaḍt wuɣur yewɛeṛ ad yaweḍ umdan
ber:Ziri yezdeɣ deg yiwet n taddart yettweṣken deg wagim tẓat n tmaḍ d kumraw
